Welcome to

The Bookplate

A place to pull quotes and summaries from the classics — just by photographing the cover.

Step one

Scan a book

Photograph or upload any book cover. We'll identify the title and author for you.

Step two

Choose what you want

Pull quotes by mood — motivational, funny, love, and more — or get a summary at whatever length suits you.

Worth knowing

Classics only, for now

This edition works with public domain books — generally anything published before 1929, plus older classical works. Perfect for philosophy, history, poetry, and classic fiction. Think Austen, Dickens, Shelley, Doyle, and similar classics.

← Back Skip
Public Domain Edition

The Bookplate

Scan a classic. Pull its quotes, or its wisdom.
Step one
Photograph the book's cover, or upload one you've already taken.
Choose a different photo
Step one
Type a book title, an author, or both — no need for a photo.
Why only classics? This edition works only with public domain books — generally anything published before 1929, plus older classical and ancient works. That's a deliberate choice while we test the idea properly, before any conversation with modern publishers. It's perfect for philosophy, history, poetry, and classic fiction — try titles like Pride and Prejudice, Sherlock Holmes, Frankenstein, Alice in Wonderland, Moby-Dick, or Meditations.

We hope you enjoy using The Bookplate — and thank you for being one of our very first readers.

Settings

Daily quote on your shelf
Shows a random favorited quote each time you open the app, once you've favorited at least 5.
Default quote mood
Pre-selected when you open the scanner. Type anything — e.g. "Motivational", "Stoic wisdom", "Funny". Leave blank for the standard default.
Default summary length & style
Pre-selected for summaries. Leave blank for the standard defaults.
Clear all history
Deletes every past scan from your history. Your favorites won't be affected.
Clear all data
Deletes your entire history and all favorited books, quotes, and summaries.
About The Bookplate
The Bookplate turns any classic book into instant quotes and summaries — scan a cover, search a title, or find a quote by theme. This edition covers public domain classics.

Book purchase links open Bookshop.org, which supports independent bookshops. As an affiliate, The Bookplate may earn a commission from qualifying purchases.

Version 1.0 · Public Domain Edition
